name: Tenjin Ads
description: Mobile ad measurement and attribution SDK for game publishers with flat-fee unlimited MMP, retention and revenue analytics.

seo.title: Tenjin Ads — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Tenjin Ads: Mobile ad measurement and attribution SDK for game publishers with flat-fee unlimited MMP, retention and revenue analytics.

when_to_use: Mobile attribution with flat-fee unlimited MMP for game publishers
Retention and revenue analytics for mobile game UA campaigns
Ad network cost aggregation and ROAS tracking for game ads

cons: Integrations may lag for niche networks
Flat fee worse for tiny app budgets
review.verdict: Flat-fee MMP that saves money at scale, ideal for growing game publishers over AppsFlyer.
review.best_for: Growing mobile game publishers scaling past AppsFlyer's per-event pricing cliff.
review.not_for: Very small apps where flat fee exceeds per-install costs, or brand advertisers.
